1-1.intro.0.text: The institutions of the Fifth Republic have become dangerous. They foster a culture of isolated power. The irresponsibility of our leaders allows them to jeopardize our common good. Citizens are excluded from political decision-making. Trust has been broken between the people and their representative institutions, particularly after the power grab by the liberal bloc, which usurped power to pursue its policies despite three successive electoral defeats. We have the power to rebuild our shared institutions. We propose that the French people adopt a new Constitution drafted by a Constituent Assembly.
